note: Several friction points this session: (1) Background task handoffs from lane-owners to the coordination ledger are unreliable — AH-004 completed visible work (391-line test file) but no handoff message arrived, requiring manual fleet-status verification. (2) verify_handoff requires a 'deferred' field that lane-owners frequently omit — the validation schema may be stricter than what lane-owners are prompted to produce. (3) The roadmap_progress tool doesn't recognize items added directly to active.v1.json (AH-* items) — it reads from a different data source, creating a split between the file and the tool's state. (4) read_source's focus option doesn't work for non-top-level functions (e.g., couldn't focus waveStatus or claimTask directly), required awk/sed workarounds. (5) smart_bash rerouting logic mangled grep args when the pattern contained pipe characters — forced raw bash after reroute_failed. (6) The session diff tool was still a placeholder at session start (now fixed by AH-006).
